checkpoints.label: Pre-tournament
checkpoints.caption: Before a ball is kicked. The pre-tournament model makes Argentina the favourite.

checkpoints.label: After Matchday 1
checkpoints.caption: Group matchday 1 complete. The ratings pick up each side's early form, but the field is still wide open.

checkpoints.label: After Matchday 2
checkpoints.caption: Group matchday 2 complete. The ratings pick up each side's early form, but the field is still wide open.

checkpoints.label: After Group Stage
checkpoints.caption: Group stage done. The 32 qualifiers head into the Round of 32.

checkpoints.label: After Round of 32
checkpoints.caption: Round of 32 complete. 16 teams still standing.

checkpoints.label: After Round of 16
checkpoints.caption: Round of 16 complete. 8 teams still standing.

checkpoints.label: Champion
checkpoints.caption: Spain are champions of the world.
